name: Ceridian Dayforce HCM API
what_it_does: Ceridian Dayforce REST API for global human capital management platform. Enables AI agents to manage employee lifecycle, process global payroll, track time and attendance, administer benefits, manage talent and performance, and integrate HCM data with business systems. Dayforce provides single-database unified HCM with real-time payroll calculations across 57+ countries.
use_cases: Syncing global employee and org data from HRIS integration agents
Querying payroll results and compensation from finance integration agents
Managing time, attendance, and scheduling from workforce management agents
Integrating talent data with learning and performance systems from HCM agents
not_for: SMB without global HCM complexity (use Gusto or Rippling)
Non-enterprise organizations without multi-country payroll requirements
Simple HR data without integrated payroll calculation needs
best_when: An enterprise or large mid-market company using Ceridian Dayforce wants AI agents to sync HR data, integrate payroll results, and automate workforce management across global operations.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Global payroll and HR data is among the most sensitive personal data. Cross-border data transfers require GDPR, data localization compliance in various jurisdictions.

auth.notes: Ceridian Dayforce uses OAuth 2.0 with client credentials for server-to-server integrations. Scopes per HR data domain. Enterprise customer credentials via Dayforce developer portal.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise per-employee HCM pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts per employee per module; API access included
pricing.notes: Canadian company (Rebranded to Dayforce Inc. in 2024). Global HCM with 57+ country payroll. Developer portal for partners. Publicly traded (DAY).

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; enterprise SLAs

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Global payroll and HR data across 57+ countries — cross-border data transfer requirements
No public MCP server — enterprise REST API via developer portal
Global data residency options but cross-border transfer compliance varies by country
Single-database architecture means data is real-time but API rate limits apply
Canadian company (now Dayforce Inc.) — EU GDPR and Canadian PIPEDA compliance
Complex data model with org, HR, payroll, time, talent all in single namespace
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Global payroll and HR data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Canadian company. Multi-region data residency. Cross-border transfer compliance required.

security_score_components.security_notes: Global HR and payroll data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Canadian company. Multi-region. Cross-border transfer compliance critical.
